mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=CC014#Sql001 */ BRAND_NAME FROM ETINTRA.STAR_BRAND_MASTER WHERE SUBSTR(COMPANY_CD, -4) = SUBSTR(#{req.brandCode},0,4) AND NEW_OLD_CLASSIFY = SUBSTR(#{req.brandCode},-1) AND RIGHT_CLASSIFY = ' ' AND PRODUCT_CLASSIFY = 'K' AND DOMESTIC_FOREIGN_CLASSIFY = '0'

SELECT /* @SQLID=CC014#Sql002 */ A.TOPIX_100_FLG AS topixFlg , A.REG_KBN , A.SOR_SERVICE_KBN , B.IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE UPPER_RANK_MKT FROM STOCK_DETAIL_MASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(IPM_PRODUCT_CODE,0, 5) BRAND_CODE , IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE FROM I_PRODUCT_MASTER WHERE IPM_PRODUCT_FLAG = '0' AND SUBSTR(IPM_PRODUCT_CODE,0, 5) = #{req.brandCode} AND IPM_PRI_EX_FLAG = '1' ) B ON TRIM(A.SEC_CODE) = TRIM(B.BRAND_CODE) WHERE A.SEC_CODE = TRIM(#{req.brandCode})

SELECT /* @SQLID=CC014#Sql003 */
A.SOR_SERVICE_KBN MKT_SOR ,A.MKT_KBN_TKY MKT_TKY ,A.MKT_KBN_NGY MKT_NGY ,A.MKT_KBN_FKO MKT_FKO ,A.MKT_KBN_SPR MKT_SPR ,NVL(B.CNT, '0') MKT_PTS FROM STOCK_DETAIL_MASTER A LEFT JOIN (SELECT SEC_CODE,COUNT(*) CNT FROM PTS_BRAND_MASTER GROUP BY SEC_CODE) B ON B.SEC_CODE = A.SEC_CODE WHERE A.SEC_CODE = TRIM(#{req.brandCode})
'1' MKT_TKY ,A.SOR_SERVICE_KBN MKT_SOR ,NVL(B.CNT, '0') MKT_PTS FROM STOCK_DETAIL_MASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SEC_CODE,COUNT(*) CNT FROM PTS_BRAND_MASTER WHERE MKT_KBN_PTS = '1' AND (MKT_LOAN_KBN_PTS IN('1', '2') OR MKT_IPPAN_LOAN_KBN_PTS = '1')
GROUP BY SEC_CODE ) B ON B.SEC_CODE = A.SEC_CODE WHERE A.SEC_CODE = TRIM(#{req.brandCode})

SELECT /* @SQLID=CC014#Sql004 */ A.BRAND_CODE , A.BRAND_NAME , B.MKT_KBN_TKY MKT_TKY , B.MKT_KBN_NGY MKT_NGY , B.MKT_KBN_FKO MKT_FKO , B.MKT_KBN_SPR MKT_SPR , C.CNT MKT_PTS , D.IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE UPPER_RANK_MKT FROM ( select CONCAT(substr(COMPANY_CD, - 4), NEW_OLD_CLASSIFY) BRAND_CODE , BRAND_NAME from ETINTRA.STAR_BRAND_MASTER where CONCAT(substr(COMPANY_CD, - 4), NEW_OLD_CLASSIFY) LIKE '%'|| #{req.search} || '%' AND PRODUCT_CLASSIFY = 'K' AND DOMESTIC_FOREIGN_CLASSIFY = '0' AND RIGHT_CLASSIFY = ' ' ) A LEFT JOIN STOCK_DETAIL_MASTER B ON TRIM(A.BRAND_CODE) = B.SEC_CODE LEFT JOIN ( select SEC_CODE , count(*) CNT from PTS_BRAND_MASTER group by SEC_CODE ) C ON TRIM(A.BRAND_CODE) = C.SEC_CODE LEFT JOIN ( select IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE , SUBSTR(IPM_PRODUCT_CODE,0,5) IPM_PRODUCT_CODE from I_PRODUCT_MASTER where IPM_PRODUCT_FLAG = '0' AND IPM_PRI_EX_FLAG = '1' ) D ON A.BRAND_CODE = D.IPM_PRODUCT_CODE ORDER BY A.BRAND_CODE

select /* @SQLID=CC014#Sql005 */ A.BRAND_CODE , A.BRAND_NAME , B.MKT_KBN_TKY MKT_TKY , B.MKT_KBN_NGY MKT_NGY , B.MKT_KBN_FKO MKT_FKO , B.MKT_KBN_SPR MKT_SPR , C.CNT MKT_PTS , D.IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE UPPER_RANK_MKT FROM ( select CONCAT(substr(COMPANY_CD, - 4), NEW_OLD_CLASSIFY) BRAND_CODE , BRAND_NAME from ETINTRA.STAR_BRAND_MASTER where CONCAT(BRAND_NAME, NEW_OLD_CLASSIFY) LIKE '%'|| #{req.search} || '%' and PRODUCT_CLASSIFY = 'K' ANd DOMESTIC_FOREIGN_CLASSIFY = '0' AND RIGHT_CLASSIFY = ' ' ) A LEFT JOIN STOCK_DETAIL_MASTER B ON TRIM(A.BRAND_CODE) = B.SEC_CODE LEFT JOIN ( select SEC_CODE , count(*) CNT from PTS_BRAND_MASTER group by SEC_CODE ) C ON TRIM(A.BRAND_CODE) = C.SEC_CODE LEFT JOIN ( select IPM_SE_INVESTMENTS_CODE , SUBSTR(IPM_PRODUCT_CODE,0,5) IPM_PRODUCT_CODE from I_PRODUCT_MASTER where IPM_PRODUCT_FLAG = '0' AND IPM_PRI_EX_FLAG = '1' ) D ON A.BRAND_CODE = D.IPM_PRODUCT_CODE ORDER BY A.BRAND_CODE
